title: 一个 Markdown 文件的崛起
brief: 概念插图，技术编辑风格。表现一个看似朴素的 Markdown 文件（带 .md 图标的文档）成为开源现象——文档周围环绕着上升的 GitHub 星标光点，象征不到一周涨到 16500 星。文件内部隐约可见几行规则文字。整体传达一个纯文本文件承载了认知偏好、悄然改变 agent 行为的张力。配色采用暖米色背景加焦糖橙点缀，克制留白，现代技术杂志封面气质，不要密集文字标注。
prompt:
Create an illustration titled '一个 Markdown 文件的崛起'. Style: contemporary editorial illustration, layered composition, subtle texture, restrained color palette, atmospheric but concrete, article-friendly visual metaphor, no text labels, no diagrams, no arrows. This is for an article or essay — not a technical document. Do NOT add any diagrams, arrows, labels, callouts, or text. Focus on a concrete visual idea with atmosphere, restraint, and editorial clarity. This is a WeChat Official Account headline cover image (公众号头条封面). Compose for a 2.35:1 ultra-wide crop (1080x460). Keep key subjects centered or in the bottom third — top area will be cropped. Design for readability as a small thumbnail in WeChat's subscription feed. Title text will be overlaid by the editor, so leave ample negative space. Language/region: zh. Target aspect ratio: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Brief:
概念插图，技术编辑风格。表现一个看似朴素的 Markdown 文件（带 .md 图标的文档）成为开源现象——文档周围环绕着上升的 GitHub 星标光点，象征不到一周涨到 16500 星。文件内部隐约可见几行规则文字。整体传达一个纯文本文件承载了认知偏好、悄然改变 agent 行为的张力。配色采用暖米色背景加焦糖橙点缀，克制留白，现代技术杂志封面气质，不要密集文字标注。
